title: Traffic
meta: Live retained MCP/HTTP frames from the admin_live traffic sink.
empty.none: No live traffic frames retained. Configure a traffic sink with kind admin_live to populate this panel.
empty.noTraffic: Admin live capture is ready, and no matching traffic has been observed in the retained range.
empty.disabled: Traffic capture is disabled, so zero retained frames is expected.
empty.unavailable: Traffic capture is enabled, but no admin_live sink is configured for this panel.
empty.filtered: Recent gateway traffic was skipped by capture filters before live retention.
empty.search: No traffic frames match your search.
statusDetail.unavailable: No admin_live ring is available; captured data may be going to another sink.
statusDetail.noTraffic: Ready for live traffic; no decisions observed yet.
statusDetail.unknown: Traffic capture state has not been reported yet.
